name: Bigby's Hand
description: You create a Large hand of shimmering, translucent force in an unoccupied space you can see within range. The hand lasts for the spell's duration, has AC 20 and hit points equal to your maximum HP, and can be moved up to 60 feet as a bonus action on your turn. While the hand exists you can use a bonus action to command it to perform one of four effects: Clenched Fist – make a melee spell attack to deal 4d8 force damage to a creature or object within 5 feet; Forceful Hand – make a Strength contest to push a creature within 5 feet, moving it up to 5 feet plus five times your spellcasting ability modifier; Grasping Hand – attempt to grapple a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet using the hand’s Strength, and on a bonus action deal 2d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier bludgeoning damage; Interposing Hand – place the hand between you and a chosen creature, granting you half cover and preventing the creature from moving through the hand’s space unless it is stronger, in which case the space becomes difficult terrain for it.
